title: Technical Leadership & Mentorship
subtitle: Tech Leadership
shortDescription: Technical guide for agile teams, focusing on quality and continuous delivery.
fullDescription:
• Team Management: Experience leading teams (two 5-people teams at Rogue Snail), distributing tasks, and providing feedback (Ambra Gaming).
  • Quality Assurance: Active practice mentoring junior developers and conducting Code Reviews (Webcore Games and Rogue Snail) to maintain code quality and consistency.

title: Systems Engineering & Scalable Backend
subtitle: Cloud & Architecture
shortDescription: Cloud architectures, microservices, and high-availability systems.
fullDescription:
• Full-Stack Development: Ability to transition between frontend (Unity C#) and backend (Node.js/Docker).
  • DevOps & Infrastructure: Proficiency in CI/CD pipelines (Bitbucket Pipelines, Jenkins) and cloud monitoring (AWS Lambda, CloudFormation), in addition to deployment on large-scale platforms like Steam.

title: Advanced Programming & Performance Optimization
subtitle: Clean Code & Efficiency
shortDescription: Performant code, bottleneck analysis, and advanced algorithms.
fullDescription:
• Data-Oriented Design (DOTS): Practical experience with Unity C# DOTS (Data-Oriented Technology Stack) on the MMORPG Profane (INSANE), proving capability with high-performance systems and memory optimization.
  • Polyglot: Solid fluency in C# and JavaScript/TypeScript, with additional background in C++ and Python.

title: Process Automation & Tooling
subtitle: CI/CD & Scripts
shortDescription: Pipeline creation, automation scripts, and continuous integration.
fullDescription:
• Custom Tools: Development of internal tools for the Unity Editor.
  • Test Automation & Setup: Creation of Shell scripts to reduce onboarding time for new developers, and implementation of automated tests using MochaJS and Unity Test Framework.
